A0146.title: Industrial Network Isolation and Segmentation
A0146.definition: Physically or logically isolating the industrial control network from the IT network and segmenting security zones to limit the spread of attacks.
A0146.description: Purdue model network layering: Isolation between Levels 0–2 (production floor) and Levels 3–5 (enterprise network); deployment of firewalls and data diodes for unidirectional data flow; dedicated VLANs for OT devices; DMZ zone buffering; strict access control.
A0146.limitation: Complete isolation impacts remote operations and maintenance; high retrofit costs; requires specialized planning.
